channel.title: GRIDWATCH
channel.description: Outages x weather x data center proximity, Midwest to Atlantic

item.title: GRIDWATCH 2026-07-23T21:29Z — 679 outages, 11,068 customers, 475 fair-weather, 8 DC-proximate

item.title: Weekly digest — week ending 2026-07-19: 8322 outages, 41.9% fair-weather
